reviews.comment:
Baños sucios, espacio verde desatendido. Preferí tomar el café en mi auto.
No hace honor a Chascomús. Otra vez no paro allí.

(Translated by Google)
Dirty bathrooms, neglected green space. I preferred to have my coffee in my car. It doesn't do Chascomús justice. I won't be stopping there again.
